claim_gate.reason: The only surviving architectures explicitly require unproved internal recoupling, transition/filter, and decoder capabilities; known shortcuts are rejected.

known_no_go_violations: Strong/weak Fourier sampling is already obstructed on GI-relevant symmetric HSP instances.
evaluations.minimum_copy_budget_rule: k >= ceil([log2|C|-h2(epsilon)-epsilon*log2(|C|-1)]/chi_1), with chi_1 from the exact involution character formula
evaluations.rationale: Known no-go or typed-interface failure invalidates the architecture.
evaluations.title: Registerwise QFT and weak label decoding

known_no_go_violations: Multiplicity counting or label projection does not construct state-dependent recoupling amplitudes.
evaluations.minimum_copy_budget_rule: k >= ceil([log2|C|-h2(epsilon)-epsilon*log2(|C|-1)]/chi_1), with chi_1 from the exact involution character formula
evaluations.rationale: Known no-go or typed-interface failure invalidates the architecture.
evaluations.title: Kronecker projector statistics as a decoder

known_no_go_violations: The two-copy rank-only mixed-state PGM formula is false on S_3.
At k=3, overlapping pair class sums satisfy an all-n nonzero commutator and do not share one tree basis.
evaluations.minimum_copy_budget_rule: k >= ceil([log2|C|-h2(epsilon)-epsilon*log2(|C|-1)]/chi_1), with chi_1 from the exact involution character formula
evaluations.rationale: Known no-go or typed-interface failure invalidates the architecture.
evaluations.title: Recursive pairwise Kronecker tree with spectrum-rank PGM

additional_proof_obligations: Supply a model-preserving natural-problem reduction if any restricted family is retained.
known_no_go_violations: Exceptional commuting classes do not cover the full natural reduction family.
Many restricted multiplicity instances have polynomial classical algorithms.
evaluations.minimum_copy_budget_rule: k >= ceil([log2|C|-h2(epsilon)-epsilon*log2(|C|-1)]/chi_1), with chi_1 from the exact involution character formula
evaluations.rationale: Known no-go or typed-interface failure invalidates the architecture.
evaluations.title: Multiplicity-free or commuting-class recoupling

additional_proof_obligations: Prove an inverse-polynomial LCU-normalized gap for the commutant Hamiltonian on all source sectors.
Prove polynomial Racah/associator moves between overlapping subset coupling trees.
Block-encode the state-dependent transition filter with controlled conditioning.
Decode the hidden involution and beat legal graph/code baselines on the source family.
evaluations.minimum_copy_budget_rule: k >= ceil([log2|C|-h2(epsilon)-epsilon*log2(|C|-1)]/chi_1), with chi_1 from the exact involution character formula
evaluations.rationale: The architecture targets the right interface but names unimplemented proof-critical primitives.
evaluations.title: YJM label front end with explicit residual multiplicity-space recoupling

additional_proof_obligations: Prove a uniform internal S_n Kronecker transform with multiplicity basis and precision bounds.
Prove a polynomial Racah/associator network for all overlapping subset terms at growing k.
Block-encode state-dependent transition weights and control inverse-frame conditioning.
Decode the hidden involution and beat all legal graph/code baselines on a natural family.
evaluations.minimum_copy_budget_rule: k >= ceil([log2|C|-h2(epsilon)-epsilon*log2(|C|-1)]/chi_1), with chi_1 from the exact involution character formula
evaluations.rationale: The architecture targets the right interface but names unimplemented proof-critical primitives.
evaluations.title: Full coherent recoupling, transition filter, and decoder

additional_proof_obligations: Prove polynomial bond dimension and contraction/circuit cost at inverse-polynomial error.
Show the tensor network is not a classical invariant shadow or efficiently contractible dequantization.
Prove robust hidden-involution decoding from its compressed outcome.
evaluations.minimum_copy_budget_rule: k >= ceil([log2|C|-h2(epsilon)-epsilon*log2(|C|-1)]/chi_1), with chi_1 from the exact involution character formula
evaluations.rationale: The architecture targets the right interface but names unimplemented proof-critical primitives.
evaluations.title: Implicit tensor-network associator and compressed decoder

falsifiers_triggered: QFT-only weak-label decoding is a known no-go route.
Multiplicity statistics are not a coherent transform or decoder.
Spectrum-rank PGM and one-tree k-copy recursion fail exact finite/all-n tests.
Exceptional commuting or restricted multiplicity families do not inherit full source-family reductions.
No surviving architecture currently satisfies every proof-critical capability.
Every architecture must also satisfy the exact class-specific Holevo/Fano copy budget; that polynomial budget is not a substitute for a measurement circuit.

mutation_proposals.new_hypothesis: YJM label front end with explicit residual multiplicity-space recoupling
proof_obligations_to_resolve: Prove an inverse-polynomial LCU-normalized gap for the commutant Hamiltonian on all source sectors.
Prove polynomial Racah/associator moves between overlapping subset coupling trees.
Block-encode the state-dependent transition filter with controlled conditioning.
Decode the hidden involution and beat legal graph/code baselines on the source family.
mutation_proposals.rationale: The architecture targets the right interface but names unimplemented proof-critical primitives.
rejection_filters: Reject if any missing capability is replaced by an undefined circuit box.
Reject if the mechanism covers only an exceptional commuting or classically tractable family.
Reject if the decoder is distinguishability or verification without hidden-involution recovery.
Reject if classical invariant or tensor-network contraction reproduces the outcome.

Block-encode state-dependent transition weights and control inverse-frame conditioning.

primitive_specs.role: Apply the solved S_n QFT registerwise.
Measure or coherently expose target tableau/Gelfand--Tsetlin labels while retaining multiplicity degeneracy.
Resolve a uniformly gapped bounded-support commutant Hamiltonian in each residual multiplicity register.
Resolve pair irreps and multiplicity bases coherently.
Use an exceptional multiplicity-free or commuting promise.
Recouple in one fixed binary tree.
Apply a spectrum/rank-derived measurement in that tree.
Move coherently among overlapping recoupling trees.
Approximate recoupling and frame action by a tensor network.
Verify a proposed hidden permutation on the natural instance.

summary: Evaluated 7 typed collective-measurement architectures, rejected 4 known-invalid shortcuts, and retained 3 proof-capability research proposals without promoting candidates.
